nodes.name: .DS_Store
nodes.summary: macOS Finder metadata file that stores folder view settings and icon positions; not part of the application source and carries no functional logic.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern configuration for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, listing commented-out gitignore-style globs (test files, generated code, per-language exclusions) that can be uncommented to exclude paths from the knowledge graph scan.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses gitignore-style glob syntax with '!' negation support; all example rules ship commented out as opt-in suggestions.

nodes.name: init_cloud_db.js
nodes.summary: Standalone CLI script that connects to an external/cloud PostgreSQL database via a connection string argument and applies schema.sql to bootstrap the production database (e.g., for a Vercel deployment).

nodes.name: initializeDatabase
nodes.summary: Reads schema.sql from disk and executes it against the cloud Postgres connection pool, logging progress and closing the pool when done.

nodes.name: init_db.js
nodes.summary: Local development setup script that creates the family_tree PostgreSQL database if it does not already exist, then connects to it and applies schema.sql to build the schema.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses hardcoded localhost credentials, appropriate only for local development bootstrapping rather than production use.

nodes.name: setup
nodes.summary: Connects to the default postgres database to conditionally create the family_tree database, then reconnects to family_tree and applies schema.sql.

nodes.name: integration.test.js
nodes.summary: End-to-end integration test suite that exercises the live backend API over HTTP (register, login, create family, add person, create relationship) using supertest against a running local server.
nodes.languageNotes: Tests hit a running dev server via HTTP rather than importing application modules directly, so no static project-internal imports are present.

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS build configuration enabling the tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins for the frontend's CSS pipeline.

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.summary: Legacy Create React App boilerplate stylesheet defining the .App container, header, logo spin animation, and link styling.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet that loads Tailwind's base, components, and utilities layers and sets base body/code font families for the app.

nodes.name: StoryTransition.js
nodes.summary: Full-screen cinematic transition page that staggers two fading text lines over timed intervals before auto-navigating to the demo family tree view.

nodes.name: StoryTransition
nodes.summary: React functional component that sequences four timed stages (text fade-ins, screen fade-out, then navigation to '/family-tree?demo=true') using chained setTimeout calls cleaned up on unmount.

nodes.name: setupTests.js
nodes.summary: Jest test environment setup file that imports @testing-library/jest-dom to enable custom DOM matchers for the frontend test suite.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.js
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration scanning all JS/JSX/TS/TSX files under src for class usage, with an empty theme extension and no additional plugins.
